mapper.insert:
insert into agent_definition(id, name, definition_desc, first_principle, second_rule, third_skill, model, default_model_id, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, status, reserver, remark) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.definitionDesc}, #{entity.firstPrinciple}, #{entity.secondRule}, #{entity.thirdSkill}, #{entity.model}, #{entity.defaultModelId}, #{entity.createBy}, #{entity.updateBy}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.reserver}, #{entity.remark})
mapper.select: select ad.id, ad.name, ad.definition_desc as definitionDesc, ad.first_principle as firstPrinciple, ad.second_rule as secondRule, ad.third_skill as thirdSkill, ad.model, ad.default_model_id as defaultModelId, ad.status, ad.create_time as createTime, ad.update_time as updateTime, ad.remark from agent_definition ad where ad.id = #{id}

select ask.id, ask.agent_id as agentId, ask.definition_desc as definitionDesc, ask.exec_content as execContent, ask.return_data_format as returnDataFormat, ask.create_time as createTime, ask.update_time as updateTime, ask.status, ask.reserver, ask.remark from agent_skill ask where ask.agent_id = #{agentId} order by ask.update_time desc nulls last, ask.create_time desc nulls last limit 1000

select ar.id, ar.agent_id as agentId, ar.definition_desc as definitionDesc, ar.trigger_condition as triggerCondition, ar.trigger_action as triggerAction, ar.create_time as createTime, ar.update_time as updateTime, ar.status, ar.reserver, ar.remark from agent_rule ar where ar.agent_id = #{agentId} order by ar.update_time desc nulls last, ar.create_time desc nulls last limit 1000

select sar.id, sar.main_agent_id as mainAgentId, sar.sub_agent_id as subAgentId, sar.create_time as createTime, sar.update_time as updateTime, sar.status, sar.reserver, sar.remark from sub_agent_relation sar where sar.main_agent_id = #{agentId} or sar.sub_agent_id = #{agentId} order by sar.update_time desc nulls last, sar.create_time desc nulls last limit 1000

select am.id, am.agent_id as agentId, am.memory_name as memoryName, am.step_name as stepName, am.trigger_condition as triggerCondition, am.trigger_action as triggerAction, am.create_time as createTime, am.update_time as updateTime, am.status, am.reserver, am.remark from agent_memory am where am.agent_id = #{agentId} order by am.update_time desc nulls last, am.create_time desc nulls last limit 1000

select amd.id, amd.agent_memory_id as agentMemoryId, amd.step_name as stepName, amd.step_type as stepType, amd.exec_content as execContent, amd.return_data_format as returnDataFormat, amd.parent_step_id as parentStepId, amd.next_step_id as nextStepId, amd.branch_condition as branchCondition, amd.branch_route as branchRoute, amd.model, amd.create_time as createTime, amd.update_time as updateTime, amd.status, amd.reserver, amd.remark from agent_memory_detail amd inner join agent_memory am on am.id = amd.agent_memory_id where am.agent_id = #{agentId} order by amd.update_time desc nulls last, amd.create_time desc nulls last limit 1000

select t.id, t.agent_memory_id as agentMemoryId, t.task_name as taskName, t.parent_task_id as parentTaskId, t.next_task_id as nextTaskId, t.step_type as stepType, t.branch_condition as branchCondition, t.branch_route as branchRoute, t.request_params as requestParams, t.return_params as returnParams, t.exec_status as execStatus, t.failure_reason as failureReason, t.create_time as createTime, t.update_time as updateTime, t.status, t.reserver, t.remark from task t where t.agent_id = #{agentId} order by t.update_time desc nulls last, t.create_time desc nulls last limit 1000

select ac.id, ac.name, ac.command, ac.role, ac.skill_id as skillId, ask.definition_desc as skillName, ac.create_time as createTime, ac.update_time as updateTime, ac.status, ac.reserver, ac.remark from atomic_command ac inner join agent_skill ask on ask.id = ac.skill_id where ask.agent_id = #{agentId} order by ac.update_time desc nulls last, ac.create_time desc nulls last limit 1000

select (select count(1) from agent_definition where id in #{id}) as agentCount, (select count(1) from agent_skill where agent_id in #{id}) as skillCount, (select count(1) from agent_rule where agent_id in #{id}) as ruleCount, (select count(1) from sub_agent_relation where main_agent_id in #{id} or sub_agent_id in #{id}) as subAgentRelationCount, (select count(1) from agent_memory where agent_id in #{id}) as memoryCount, (select count(1) from agent_memory_detail where agent_memory_id in (select id from agent_memory where agent_id in #{id})) as memoryDetailCount, (select count(1) from task where agent_id in #{id}) as taskCount, (select count(1) from task_detail where task_id in (select id from task where agent_id in #{id})) as taskDetailCount, (select count(1) from atomic_command where skill_id in (select id from agent_skill where agent_id in #{id})) as atomicCommandUnlinkCount
mapper.delete: delete from task where agent_id in #{id}
delete from agent_memory where agent_id in #{id}
delete from agent_rule where agent_id in #{id}
delete from agent_skill where agent_id in #{id}
delete from agent_chat_session where agent_id in #{id}
